case_title: JAMAICA STEPHENSON VS. LAKEYSHA D. WHITE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEPHENSON, JAMAICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, LAKEYSHA D. $2,592.30 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,592.30, DEFENDANT LAKEYSHA D. WHITE NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
